title: salvia cavaleriei var. erythrophylla
intro: Salvia cavaleriei var. erythrophylla, also known as Red Sage, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Salvia cavaleriei var. erythrophylla include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
